overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path and railroad tracks through open grassland during a rainstorm. The weather transitions from dark overcast to partly cloudy as the character encounters horse-drawn wagons and riders in a rural American frontier setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt wagon road beside rocky cliff

events.description: covered wagon drawn by horses overtakes from behind and passes on the left
lone horse rider gallops past at high speed from behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy dirt path with rocky terrain visible to the left

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with canvas top overtakes the character on the left side of the path
rider on brown horse gallops past quickly heading in the same direction

entered.detail: large layered rock formation rising above the grassy hillside on the left side of the path
muddy wagon trail with visible wheel ruts cutting through the green grassland

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt wagon road with a rocky cliff face visible on the left and open grassland on the right. A covered wagon overtakes from behind, followed shortly by a galloping horse rider, both moving in the same direction along the path.

events.description: railroad tracks become visible on the right side of the path, running parallel to the road

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as the landscape opens up into rolling grassland

entered.detail: tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and multiple wires running parallel to the path
steel railway tracks on a gravel bed running parallel to the dirt road

segments.scene_description: The rocky cliff recedes behind as the character enters open grassland. Wooden telegraph poles line the right side of the path, and railroad tracks come into view in the distance, gradually approaching as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad track bed with gravel ballast

events.description: second covered wagon overtakes from behind on the left side
character steps off the dirt path and begins walking directly on the railroad track bed

agents.ego_description: walking along the railroad tracks, stepping on wooden ties and gravel ballast

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with driver overtakes on the left side of the tracks

segments.scene_description: A second wagon passes by on the left as the character transitions from the dirt road onto the railroad tracks. The character now walks directly on the gravel ballast and wooden ties, with telegraph poles continuing to line the right side of the corridor.

events.description: storm clouds part and sunlight breaks through, dramatically brightening the scene from overcast to sunny

agents.ego_description: continuing along the railroad tracks under brightening skies with sun breaking through

segments.scene_description: The weather clears significantly as the character continues along the railroad tracks. Dark storm clouds give way to bright sunlight, changing the lighting from diffused gray to warm direct sun, while the open grassland stretches out on both sides of the tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural frontier path that transitions from a narrow cliffside road into an expansive open grassland. It begins with the character walking beside a rocky cliff face while a covered wagon and a galloping rider overtake them from behind. As the character moves forward, the rocky terrain recedes, giving way to wide fields of grass. The scene then expands to reveal a line of wooden telegraph poles marking the right side of the path before the camera gradually approaches a set of railroad tracks appearing in the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural corridor as a storm breaks to reveal a sun-drenched frontier landscape. It begins with a second wagon passing on the left as the character transitions from a dirt road onto the gravel ballast and wooden ties of a railroad track. As the character continues forward, telegraph poles line the right side of the path while the surrounding open grassland stretches toward the horizon. The scene then shifts dramatically as dark storm clouds give way to bright sunlight, transforming the diffused gray lighting into warm, direct sun. This atmospheric clearing culminates in a vivid, brightly lit vista that expands across the plains.
